template.p: The Community Care industry is currently undergoing a digital revolution. This Odoo industry package is designed to rescue educators and caregivers from "administrative debt"—those exhausting hours lost to paper files and fragmented spreadsheets that should be spent with the residents. By verticalizing Odoo, we provide a professionalized, unified "Single Source of Truth" that handles the complexity of social care with the simplicity of a modern utility.

With millions of residents in small facilities globally, the need for a secure, integrated system has never been higher. This package leverages Odoo's powerful core modules to transform how small homes manage staff, legal records, and daily care. Ultimately, we are giving care teams the tools to refocus on their true mission: providing a safe, supportive environment for every resident, not just managing clicks.

ul.li: Residents App: A specialized workspace to manage the placement lifecycle from admission to successful transition.
Contacts: Securely manage residents, guardians, and medical networks in a centralized, categorized database.
Planning: Coordinate 24/7 staff coverage to ensure safety ratios and consistent caregiver presence.
Documents: Store sensitive legal orders, school reports, and care plans in a secure, searchable location.
Timesheets: Log specific care hours and administrative tasks for accurate facility operational reporting.
Calendar: Organize medical appointments and family visits with automated reminders for the entire team.
Employees: Manage staff certifications and hierarchies to ensure the most qualified team is always on-site.
Time Off: Handle leave requests seamlessly without compromising critical caregiver-to-resident safety ratios.
Knowledge: Draft collaborative observation logs and formal reports using standardized, professional templates.
Project: Track long-term developmental milestones and facility maintenance tasks through organized stages.

template.p: Streamline your admission process by moving from the Residents to Documents and Knowledge. This ensures that as soon as a resident is created, their network of guardians is mapped, their legal mandates are filed, and their first appointments are scheduled.

ul.li: Residents app: Use the dedicated dashboard to view your current residents.
Specialized profiles: Capture unique data like Nicknames, Primary Languages, and Date of Birth to provide personalized, trauma-informed care.
Relationship mapping: Within the Contacts Tab, link parents, legal guardians, social workers, and primary physicians to create a 360-degree care circle.
Related data: Leverage the smart buttons from residents to reach their Documents and notes efficiently.

template.p: Link your human resources directly to resident needs. By integrating Employees, Planning, and Time Off, you ensure that the house is always staffed with the right certifications and that safety ratios are never compromised.

ul.li: Planning App: Utilize the Gantt View to visualize 24/7 coverage. Create templates for recurring shifts to save hours on weekly scheduling.
Time Off Management: Automatically sync staff absences with the Planning App to identify coverage gaps before they become safety risks.
Timesheets: Staff can log hours against specific care activities, providing management with clear data on administrative vs. direct-care time.
Employee Records: Store mandatory certifications and training records in the Employees App to ensure compliance with local care regulations.

template.p: Centralize critical medical data and legal mandates to eliminate dangerous information silos. This sequence ensures that in an emergency, life-saving information like allergies and blood types is accessible in seconds.

ul.li: Medical & Safety Dashboard: Located directly on the Resident profile, this tab provides instant visibility of Blood Types, Allergies, and Medication Protocols.
Documents App: Organize files by folder (e.g., Legal, Health, School) and use the Group By Folder view to find a specific scan or report instantly.
Allergy Alerts: Leverage color-coded tags for Allergies and Medical Conditions that appear on the Resident Kanban and List views for high-visibility warnings.
Legal Compliance: Store the Placement Mandate and Court Orders directly in the record, ensuring staff always know the current legal status of a minor.

template.p: Replace scattered notebooks with a collaborative Knowledge Base. This sequence allows staff to log daily observations, record meeting outcomes, and share mentorship strategies in real-time.

ul.li: Daily Liaison Logs: Use Knowledge Articles to record anecdotes and shift handovers. This ensures that the night shift knows exactly what happened during the day.
Standardized Templates: Create "Report Ready" articles for School Reports or Life Goal Plans, significantly reducing the time spent on formal correspondence.
Meeting Focus: Utilize the Smart Button on the Resident profile to jump directly to meeting notes that focus on that specific individual.
Mentorship Planning: Document long-term "Life Paths" and collaborative goals between mentors and residents, tracking progress through the Project App.

template.p: Secure your financial baseline and prove your utility to state regulators without the end-of-month spreadsheet panic. The Dashboard app automates the tedious task of prorating monthly night stays for billing, while aggregating long-term demographic data to generate audit-proof annual reports.

ul.li: Monthly overnights: Automatically generate nominative lists of overnight stays for the previous month. The built-in mathematical engine handles ongoing stays (empty departure dates) flawlessly, eliminating manual night-by-night counting.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Interactive Audit Mode: Access the underlying Spreadsheet behind the dashboard to switch from "Automatic" to "Manual" mode. Input any historical dates to recalculate the entire report instantly. This is perfect for answering retro-active funding disputes or state audits from 6 months ago.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: You completed that demo use case! There are millions of other ways to adapt your Odoo setup to fit your business needs.
Discover more about Odoo by diving into our documentation and academy, and feel free to request a demo if you need help!

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3

ul.li: Use the Kanban Grouping: Group your Residents App by age or legal status to get an instant bird's-eye view of your facility's demographic and legal landscape.
Leverage Color Tags: Use bright colors for Allergies and Medication alerts. This visual cue is the fastest way to prevent errors during meal times or activities.
Standardize Handovers: Encourage all staff to use a specific Knowledge Template for shift handovers. Consistency in documentation leads to better continuity of care.
Secure Your Folders: Regularly audit the Documents App folder permissions to ensure that sensitive legal data is only accessible to authorized "Need to Know" staff.

template.h1: Do You Want to Go Further?
template.p: Explore additional apps to enhance your community care management:

ul.li: Accounting – Advanced financial management and reporting.
Sign – Collect digital signatures for placement mandates and approvals.
Maintenance – Track repairs for the facility and safety equipment.

template.p: Odoo offers scalable solutions that grow with your organization. By integrating these apps, care homes can maximize operational efficiency, improve resident outcomes, and maintain regulatory compliance.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false

div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?

template.p:
You might have tested this package with or without demo data.
In any case, you may have written records which are not deletable and which might be an issue for your traceability.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3

p.strong: In such situation, feel free to experiment with this database and then to create a new one for your own usage.
